full_text:
Wu Gai (Yuanxia) 武陔 (元夏)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Gai (武陔), styledYuanxia (元夏), was born in from Zhu village in Peiguo (modern-day Suzhou in Anhui). Noted judge of character and trusted by Sima Zhao, reached high rank. Wu Gai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Wu Gai lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
